ontology.foodon_gap_note: FoodOn has a general coffee beverage class; no specific iced Americano term exists. closest_parent used.
ontology.foodex2_gap_note: FoodEx2 A00LC covers black coffee broadly; iced Americano is a diluted espresso served cold, which is the closest defensible parent category.
ontology.snomed_ct_gap_note: SNOMED CT 34731007 refers to coffee as a substance; used as closest parent for this coffee beverage.

serving.natural_language_portion: One standard takeaway cup of iced Americano, approximately 350 ml, consisting of one or two shots of espresso diluted with cold water and served over ice.

nutrient_source.title: Coffee, brewed, espresso, restaurant-prepared — USDA FoodData Central SR Legacy (NDB 14209); dilution factor applied for Americano preparation
nutrient_source.organization: USDA Agricultural Research Service — FoodData Central
nutrient_source.source_match_notes: An Iced Americano is espresso diluted approximately 1:3 with cold water and served over ice. USDA FoodData Central entry for brewed espresso (FDC ID 171891) was used as the base. Per-100g values were adapted by applying a 1:3 dilution factor (25% espresso, 75% water) to reflect the typical Americano composition. Energy, caffeine, and micronutrients scale proportionally. The resulting beverage is essentially water with trace coffee solids.

gi_source.title: Glycemic index of beverages — black coffee and espresso-based drinks without added sugar
gi_source.source_match_notes: Black coffee and unsweetened espresso-based beverages are consistently reported as having a negligible glycemic response due to the absence of digestible carbohydrates. The University of Sydney GI Database and peer-reviewed literature (Moisey et al., 2008, Am J Clin Nutr) confirm that black coffee does not raise blood glucose meaningfully. glycemic_index is set to 1 (the lowest valid positive sentinel value) per convention for essentially zero-GI beverages containing no glycemic carbohydrates. glycemic_load_per_serving is 0.0 as carbohydrate_g per serving is negligible.

hypertension.key_factor: Negligible sodium content; caffeine may cause transient blood pressure elevation
hypertension.guidance: An unsweetened iced Americano contains approximately 7 mg sodium per 350 ml serving and poses minimal dietary sodium concern for hypertensive individuals; however, caffeine content (approximately 60–120 mg per serving) may cause a transient, short-lived rise in blood pressure and should be moderated in caffeine-sensitive hypertensive patients.

type2_diabetes.key_factor: No added sugar; negligible carbohydrate content; no glycemic impact
type2_diabetes.guidance: An unsweetened iced Americano contains negligible carbohydrates and no added sugar, resulting in no meaningful postprandial glucose response, making it a suitable beverage choice for individuals with Type 2 Diabetes when consumed without sweeteners or milk.

cardiovascular_disease.key_factor: Zero saturated fat; zero cholesterol; moderate caffeine intake
cardiovascular_disease.guidance: An unsweetened iced Americano contains no saturated fat or cholesterol and does not adversely affect cardiovascular lipid profiles; moderate coffee consumption (up to 3–4 cups per day) has been associated with neutral to beneficial cardiovascular outcomes in epidemiological studies, though individuals with arrhythmias should monitor caffeine intake.

llm_training.natural_language_description: An Iced Americano is a cold coffee beverage made by diluting one or two shots of espresso with cold water and serving the mixture over ice. It originates from the Americano style of coffee — traditionally espresso diluted with hot water — adapted for cold service. The beverage has a bold, slightly bitter coffee flavour with a clean, refreshing finish due to the ice and cold water. The texture is thin and watery compared to cold brew or iced lattes. It contains no milk, cream, or added sugar in its standard form, making it one of the lowest-calorie coffee options available. Per 100 g, an unsweetened iced Americano provides approximately 2.5 kcal, 0.1 g protein, 0.0 g fat, and 0.4 g carbohydrate, with negligible sodium. It is naturally vegan, dairy-free, and gluten-free. The glycemic index is effectively zero as there are no digestible carbohydrates present. Clinically, it is suitable for individuals managing Type 2 Diabetes, hypertension, or cardiovascular disease when consumed without added sweeteners. The primary bioactive compound is caffeine, which provides alertness and mild thermogenic effects. In Singapore and Malaysia, iced Americano is widely available at specialty coffee bars and café chains, often priced at a premium compared to traditional kopi. EC Coffee Bar on Carpenter Street, Singapore, is one such establishment offering this beverage.
common_user_queries: Is iced Americano good for diabetics?
How many calories in an iced Americano?
Is iced Americano the same as black coffee?
Can I drink iced Americano if I have high blood pressure?
What is the difference between iced Americano and cold brew?
How much caffeine is in an iced Americano?

confidence_reason: No exact USDA or HPB entry exists for iced Americano as a prepared beverage. Values are adapted from USDA FoodData Central espresso data (FDC ID 171891) using a standard 1:3 espresso-to-water dilution ratio, which is the accepted preparation method. The adaptation is methodologically sound but introduces minor uncertainty in exact per-100g values depending on espresso shot volume and dilution ratio used by the specific restaurant.
notes: 1. fat_g is 0.0: naturally zero — espresso and water contain no fat in detectable quantities; confirmed zero per USDA FoodData Central FDC ID 171891. 2. saturated_fat_g is 0.0: naturally zero by the same basis. 3. monounsaturated_fat_g is 0.0: naturally zero. 4. polyunsaturated_fat_g is 0.0: naturally zero. 5. trans_fat_g is 0.0: naturally zero. 6. sugar_g is 0.0: naturally zero — no added sugar in standard unsweetened preparation; confirmed zero per USDA source. 7. dietary_fibre_g is 0.0: naturally zero — coffee beverages contain no dietary fibre. 8. cholesterol_mg is 0.0: naturally zero — plant-derived beverage. 9. vitamin_c_mg is 0.0: confirmed zero per USDA source. 10. vitamin_a_mcg_rae is 0.0: confirmed zero per USDA source. 11. vitamin_b1_thiamine_mg is 0.0: confirmed zero per USDA source. 12. vitamin_b6_mg is 0.0: confirmed zero per USDA source. 13. vitamin_b12_mcg is 0.0: naturally zero — plant-derived beverage. 14. folate_mcg_dfe is 0.0: confirmed zero per USDA source. 15. vitamin_d_mcg is 0.0: naturally zero — no UV-exposed animal products. 16. vitamin_e_mg is 0.0: confirmed zero per USDA source. 17. zinc_mg is 0.0: confirmed zero per USDA source. 18. selenium_mcg is 0.0: confirmed zero per USDA source. 19. glycemic_index set to 1 (effectively zero) as this beverage contains no glycemic carbohydrates; gi_category low per convention. glycemic_load_per_serving is 0.0 as carbohydrate content per serving is negligible. 20. Input cuisine tag 'Malaysian' reflects the restaurant origin (EC Coffee Bar, Carpenter Street, Singapore) rather than the beverage's culinary origin; cuisine has been corrected to International / Café. Multilingual names follow Singaporean dish rules given the Singapore context of the source record. 21. Price SGD 8.30 preserved from input as contextual metadata only; not used in nutritional calculations.
